summary: Generate mode testing complete. All new subscription and pricing features tested successfully. Created 16 backend tests and 14 frontend E2E tests for the Stripe monetization system with freemium model.
seed_data_creation: Test data created dynamically with TEST_ prefix and UUIDs (promo codes, test users), no cleanup required as unique IDs used.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription monetization features fully tested. Backend tests cover: subscription plans API, user registration with free tier, subscription status endpoint, promo code creation/application, checkout session creation. Frontend tests cover: pricing page display with plan cards, promo code input/apply functionality, premium badge in campaign list header, checkout button visibility.

features_tested.subscription_plans_api: PASS - Returns correct free and adventurer plans with features list
features_tested.user_registration_subscription: PASS - New users start on free tier (2 campaigns, 5 AI/month)
features_tested.subscription_status_endpoint: PASS - Returns correct tier info with all required fields
features_tested.promo_code_creation: PASS - Creates promo codes with tier_granted and uses_remaining
features_tested.promo_code_application: PASS - Upgrades user from free to adventurer tier
features_tested.pricing_page_display: PASS - Shows plan cards for Free ($0) and Adventurer ($3.99)
features_tested.promo_code_frontend: PASS - Input and apply button work, shows appropriate error/success toasts
features_tested.premium_badge_campaign_list: PASS - Pricing button visible with correct badge text (Adventurer/Upgrade)
